news_items.text:
Team News: Senegal vs. Iraq injury, suspension lists, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026 - Sports Mole

Menu

World Cup Gameweek 3

Toronto Stadium

# Team News: Senegal vs. Iraq injury, suspension lists, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026

By Seye Omidiora| 25 Jun 2026 20:00

© Iconsport / Sportimage

Senegal face fellow Group I strugglers Iraq on Friday, with both nations looking to secure a vital victory to keep their faint World Cup knockout dreams alive.

Pape Thiaw's side find themselves on the brink of elimination following an error-strewn 3-2 defeat against Norway, while Graham Arnold's men sit bottom of the section after conceding seven goals in heavy losses to France and the Norwegians.

Here, Sports Mole rounds up the team news for both nations.

---

## SENEGAL vs. IRAQ

## SENEGAL

Out: Edouard Mendy(knee)

Doubtful: None

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Diaw; Diatta, Koulibaly, Niakhate, Diouf; Camara, I. Gueye, P. Gueye; Sarr, Jackson, Mane

## IRAQ

Out: None

Doubtful: Aymen Hussein(hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Basil; Ali, Tahseen, Hashem, Doski; Ismail, Al-Ammari, Iqbal; Qasem, Al-Hamadi, Bayesh

---

Written by

Share this article:

Subscribe to our newsletter

Ge

news_items.title: Iraq attack depleted before Senegal World Cup decider - Shafaq News | Latest breaking news in Iraq and the world
news_items.text:
Iraq attack depleted before Senegal World Cup decider - Shafaq News | Latest breaking news in Iraq and the world

🏆 FIFA World Cup 2026

11 June - 19 July 2026

00 days

00 hours

00 mins

00 secs

View matches

Breaking News

Coordination Framework: New ministries under study

Iraq completes first multimodal TIR shipment linking Jordan to UAE

World Cup 2026 June 26 preview: Iraq’s hopes hang on Senegal

USD/IQD exchange rates stabilize in Baghdad, dip in Erbil

2026-06-23T22:22:51+00:00

Share

font

Enable Reading Mode

A- A A+

Shafaq News- Toronto

Iraq suffered another attacking blow before their decisive World Cup match against Senegal, with striker Muhannad Ali “Mimi” ruled out through injury and Aymen Hussein also unlikely to recover in time.

A source in Iraq’s medical staff told Shafaq News that Muhannad Ali will not be available for the June 26 match against Senegal in the final round of Group I. The injury will keep the forward out for the rest of Iraq’s World Cup campaign, including any Round of 32 match if the team manage to advance.

Muhannad Ali had already missed Iraq’s 3-0 defeat to France after sustaining an injury during training in the United States, raising

PREVIEW | Senegal vs Iraq: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 26/06)

Senegal and Iraq face off this Friday at the BMO Field in World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 20:00 on ITV 4.

In their last game, Senegal lost 3-2 against Norway (World Cup 2026). In their last fixture, Iraq suffered a 3-0 reverse against France (World Cup 2026).

{"title": "Team News: Senegal vs. Iraq injury, suspension lists, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026 - Sports Mole", "url": "https://www.sportsmole.co.uk/football/senegal/world-cup-2026/team-news/senegal-vs-iraq-injury-suspension-lists-predicted-xis_599962.html", "publishedDate": "2026-06-25T19:00:00.000Z", "author": null, "text": "Team News: Senegal vs. Iraq injury, suspension lists, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026 - Sports Mole

# Team News: Senegal vs. Iraq injury, suspension lists, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026

By Seye Omidiora| 25 Jun 2026 20:00

© Iconsport / Sportimage

Senegal face fellow Group I strugglers Iraq on Friday, with both nations looking to secure a vital victory to keep their faint World Cup knockout dreams alive.

Pape Thiaw's side find themselves on the brink of elimination following an error-strewn 3-2 defeat against Norway, while Graham Arnold's men sit bottom of the section after conceding seven goals in heavy losses to France and the Norwegians.

Here, Sports Mole rounds up the team news for both nations.

---

## SENEGAL vs. IRAQ

## SENEGAL

Out: Edouard Mendy(knee)

Doubtful: None

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Diaw; Diatta, Koulibaly, Niakhate, Diouf; Camara, I. Gueye, P. Gueye; Sarr, Jackson, Mane

## IRAQ

Out: None

Doubtful: Aymen Hussein(hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Basil; Ali, Tahseen, Hashem, Doski; Ismail, Al-Ammari, Iqbal; Qasem, Al-Hamadi, Bayesh

---

Written by

Shafaq News- Toronto

Iraq suffered another attacking blow before their decisive World Cup match against Senegal, with striker Muhannad Ali “Mimi” ruled out through injury and Aymen Hussein also unlikely to recover in time.

A source in Iraq’s medical staff told Shafaq News that Muhannad Ali will not be available for the June 26 match against Senegal in the final round of Group I. The injury will keep the forward out for the rest of Iraq’s World Cup campaign, including any Round of 32 match if the team manage to advance.

PREVIEW | Senegal vs Iraq: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 26/06)

Senegal and Iraq face off this Friday at the BMO Field in World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 20:00 on ITV 4.

In their last game, Senegal lost 3-2 against Norway (World Cup 2026). In their last fixture, Iraq suffered a 3-0 reverse against France (World Cup 2026).
